title: Cleanup
body:
Only print logrus if in debug mode 

 Validate options

If an string option is passed in, and it is not followed by a value,
then error out with a message saying the option requires a value.

For example

buildah from --creds --pull dan
option --creds requires a value

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Probably want the same patches for kpod.

I'm slightly concerned we might someday have someone try and pass a legitimate argument that begins with a hyphen. But I can't think of any cases where this would actually be something people do. I suppose we can handle it if someone actually files a bug report about it.

LGTM.
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
